name: Open Telemark and Wing
preceding_figure_names: Open Telemark, Back Whisk, Basic Weave, Contra Check, Fallaway Whisk, Open Impetus, Outside Change, Turning Lock, Turning Lock to R, Weave From Promenade Position, Whisk
following_figure_names: Closed Telemark, Open Telemark, Double Reverse Spin, Progressive Chasse To R, Reverse Turn, Drag Hesitation, Fallaway Reverse And Slip Pivot, Whisk (at corner)
notes:
Wing can be used from other positions.
Less turn can be made on Wing to end facing LOD.

steps.action: LF fwd, DC, HT, start to turn L, Sway(S), CBM, rise e/o 1
